task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis Dicomizer application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Import the source image into Weasis Dicomizer
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'endoscopy_capture.jpg' from the Desktop is visible in the input files list of Weasis Dicomizer, or there is an open file dialog selecting this file.

task_completion.description: Set the Patient Name to Doe^John
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Patient Name field in the Weasis Dicomizer interface contains 'Doe^John'.

task_completion.description: Set the Patient ID to ENDO-5512
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Patient ID field in the Weasis Dicomizer interface contains 'ENDO-5512'.
The Modality field or dropdown in the Weasis Dicomizer interface is set to 'ES'.

task_completion.description: Set the export directory and initiate the DICOM creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The output/export directory is set to '/home/ga/DICOM/exports' (or '~/DICOM/exports/') and there is evidence of the export process being initiated (e.g., clicking a 'Dicomize', 'Export', or 'Build' button, or a progress/success/error dialog).

integrity.description: The agent used the Weasis Dicomizer GUI to perform the conversion
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Weasis Dicomizer graphical interface rather than terminal commands (like dcmtk or python scripts) to create the DICOM file.

integrity.description: Patient details are entered into the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The patient name, ID, and modality are typed into the specific input fields of the Weasis Dicomizer application, not just written in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The export path is configured in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The export directory '/home/ga/DICOM/exports' is visible in the destination folder field of the Weasis Dicomizer GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source image is located at /home/ga/Desktop/endoscopy_capture.jpg. The expected patient name is Doe^John, patient ID is ENDO-5512, and modality is ES. The export directory should be /home/ga/DICOM/exports. Note: Due to a broken download link in the setup, the source 'image' might actually be an HTML file. Weasis Dicomizer may display an error when importing or processing it. Score based on the agent's correct configuration of the fields and attempts to export, even if the application throws an error regarding the invalid image file.
